rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow a user to log in.
The system shall display the main area after a user signs in, allowing them to choose what to check.
The system shall show market conditions when the user selects this option.
The system shall require users to provide a photo when they choose pest control help.
The system shall provide soil-related suggestions after receiving soil information from the user.
The system shall offer weather insights based on the provided location.
The system shall display labour availability details after receiving a location from the user.
The system shall allow users to continue using the service after viewing any of these results.
The system shall end the session when a user logs out.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows a user to log in.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A user begins by logging in.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After signing in, the system displays the main area where users can choose what they want to check.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After signing in, they reach the main area where they can choose what they want to check.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system shows market conditions upon user selection.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they choose market conditions, they are shown the market report and can then continue using the service.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system requires users to provide a photo for pest control help.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they choose pest control, they provide the required photo, and once the details are accepted, they are shown pest control techniques.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system provides soil-related suggestions after receiving soil information from the user.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they choose soil-related help, they provide soil information, and once the details are accepted, they are shown which crops are suitable.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system offers weather insights based on the provided location.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they choose weather insights, they provide their location, and once the location is available, they are shown the weather analysis.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system displays labour availability details after receiving a location from the user.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they choose labour availability, they provide their location, and once the location is available, they are shown the labour availability details.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After viewing any of these results, the user can continue using the service again.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After viewing any of these results, the user can continue using the service again.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system ends the session when a user logs out.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they choose to log out, the session ends.
